result.stdout:
Usage: templateversions [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                  Show help information
  -s|--sdkversion <SDKVERSION>  The dotnet SDK version to check for. IE: v2.2.401
  -l|--list                     List SDK version in .templateengine directory and exit.
  -a|--all                      List all templates across all your installed SDKs.
  -n|--noversionall             Like --all, except removes SDK versions and orders the ouput.

  -a|--all                      List all templates across all your installed SDKs.
  -n|--noversionall             Like --all, except removes SDK versions and orders the ouput.
